_about: Cross-model KV-cache quantization matrix (single harness: tq_paper_lb_shard.py). LongBench English subset, full 200 samples/task, greedy decode. Calibration-free 4-bit KV = NF4 keys (group 32) + 2% per-channel fp16 outliers + 4 sink tokens, values per-token uniform 4-bit; HOT=128 fp16 recent window; prefill quantized once. post = quantize post-RoPE keys; pre = quantize pre-RoPE keys.

wikitext2_ppl._about: WikiText-2 perplexity (lower better), seqlen 2048, same KV-quant recipe as LongBench. Corroborates the LongBench story on a continuous metric.

qwen2.5-7b-instruct._note: symmetric NF4 ppl EXPLODES 10x (collapse); asym-NF4 holds at fp16.

llama2-7b-chat.winner: asym-NF4 ~= NF4 (both ~20.8 qasper; asym-NF4 best trec/triviaqa)

mistral-7b-instruct.winner: asym-NF4 ~= NF4 (28.74 vs 29.96 qasper; triviaqa better)

qwen2.5-7b-instruct._note: COLLAPSES under 4-bit NF4 (degenerate repetition). Uniform rescues it. 7:1 GQA -> low error tolerance. See results_rescue.json.
qwen2.5-7b-instruct.winner: asym-NF4 (41.91 qasper, within 1.86 of fp16; +8.1 over uniform; NF4 collapses). RESCUED by per-group zero-point.

findings.headline_method: asym-NF4 (mean-centered / per-group zero-point NF4) is a single calibration-free codebook robust across architectures. It TIES NF4 where NF4 works (Llama-2-7B qasper 20.81~=20.82; Mistral 28.74 vs 29.96; beats NF4 on triviaqa for both) and RESCUES the collapse where NF4 fails (Qwen2.5-7B 41.91 vs NF4 4.69 vs uniform 33.81; within 1.86 of fp16 43.77). Keeps NF4's nonlinear levels (beats uniform) + adds a zero-point to absorb the DC offset (avoids collapse).
findings.codebook_crossover: Plain NF4 (symmetric) wins on Llama/Mistral by 5-9 qasper but COLLAPSES at high GQA (Qwen 7:1). Uniform never collapses but loses 5-9 pts to NF4 elsewhere. asym-NF4 dominates both.
findings.qwen_collapse_cause: Codebook shape, not bit-depth: 3-bit uniform (34.92) beats 4-bit NF4 (4.69) on Qwen. NF4's zero-centered absmax wastes ~half its codes on DC-offset keys; Qwen's 7:1 GQA amplifies the resulting error past tolerance.
findings.pre_vs_post_rope: Pre-RoPE helps ONLY Llama-2-7B (qasper +0.49). Hurts Llama-2-13B (-1.88) and Mistral (-1.61). Demoted to ablation (early over-claim corrected by the matrix).
